description: This professional-grade Browin 313016 set is a comprehensive solution for home meat processing, featuring a 1.5kg capacity pressure ham maker integrated with a dedicated water jacket pot. The set specifically includes a high-quality stainless steel ham cooker, a matching four-litre pot, a lid with a thermometer port, and a specialised digital probe thermometer for precision monitoring. It is designed for poaching meats in a controlled environment, ensuring succulent results for hams, terrines, and roulades. The water jacket design prevents direct contact with heating elements for uniform temperature distribution throughout the vessel.
features: 1.5kg meat chamber capacity; 4L water jacket pot capacity for bain-marie style scalding; 18/10 stainless steel construction; Integrated pressure spring mechanism ensures consistent texture and binding; Flange-mounted lid with dedicated thermometer port; Compatible with electric, induction, and gas hobs; Includes digital probe thermometer for core temperature monitoring.
uses: Curing and scalding homemade ham; Preparing luncheon meats and pressed terrines; Poaching rollades; Vegetarian blocks and vegan pates.

accessories.name: Ham Cooker Vessel
accessories.description: Cylindrical stainless steel chamber with pressure spring lid.

accessories.name: Water Jacket Pot
accessories.description: 4L stainless steel stockpot sized specifically to house the ham cooker for water bath cooking.

accessories.name: Digital Thermometer
accessories.description: Probe thermometer for monitoring core meat temperature.

accessories.name: Ham Cooker Bags
accessories.description: Plastic liners to facilitate meat removal and cleaning.

name: Browin Pressure Ham Cooker Set 1.5kg (313016)
